bead.title: Lint rule: forbid external imports of per-harness packages outside execute_dispatch.go
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-10
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-014-universal-harness-interface.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. internal/lint/ (or the project lint pass) rejects any .go file outside internal/harnesses/ that imports internal/harnesses/{claude,codex,gemini,opencode,pi} except internal/serviceimpl/execute_dispatch.go
2. Rule wired into lefthook.yml and CI
3. Error message cites CONTRACT-004 invariant #1
4. An intentional violation in a feature branch reproduces the failure with a clear message
